mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM wms_material WHERE del_flag = '0') AS count, (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(qty), 0) FROM wms_inventory WHERE del_flag = '0') AS qty, (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(lock_qty), 0) FROM wms_inventory WHERE del_flag = '0') AS lock_qty, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM wms_warehouse WHERE del_flag = '0' AND node_type = '1') AS material_id, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM wms_inbound_order WHERE del_flag = '0' AND status = '3') AS inbound_qty, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM wms_outbound_order WHERE del_flag = '0' AND status = '3') AS outbound_qty FROM dual

SELECT w.warehouse_id AS warehouse_id, w.warehouse_name AS name, IFNULL(SUM(i.qty), 0) AS qty, IFNULL(SUM(i.lock_qty), 0) AS lock_qty, IFNULL(SUM(i.qty + i.lock_qty), 0) AS total_qty FROM wms_warehouse w LEFT JOIN wms_inventory i ON w.warehouse_id = i.warehouse_id AND i.del_flag = '0' WHERE w.del_flag = '0' AND w.node_type = '1' GROUP BY w.warehouse_id, w.warehouse_name ORDER BY total_qty DESC

SELECT m.material_type AS code, CASE m.material_type WHEN '0' THEN '原材料' WHEN '1' THEN '半成品' WHEN '2' THEN '成品' WHEN '3' THEN '辅料' ELSE '未分类' END AS name, IFNULL(SUM(i.qty), 0) AS qty, IFNULL(SUM(i.lock_qty), 0) AS lock_qty, IFNULL(SUM(i.qty + i.lock_qty), 0) AS total_qty FROM wms_material m LEFT JOIN wms_inventory i ON m.material_id = i.material_id AND i.del_flag = '0' WHERE m.del_flag = '0' GROUP BY m.material_type ORDER BY total_qty DESC

SELECT t.date AS date, IFNULL(SUM(t.inbound_qty), 0) AS inbound_qty, IFNULL(SUM(t.outbound_qty), 0) AS outbound_qty FROM ( SELECT DATE(o.complete_date) AS date, o.total_qty AS inbound_qty, 0 AS outbound_qty FROM wms_inbound_order o WHERE o.del_flag = '0' AND o.status = '3' AND o.complete_date IS NOT NULL AND DATE(o.complete_date) >= #{params.beginTime} AND DATE(o.complete_date) <= #{params.endTime} UNION ALL SELECT DATE(o.complete_date) AS date, 0 AS inbound_qty, o.total_qty AS outbound_qty FROM wms_outbound_order o WHERE o.del_flag = '0' AND o.status = '3' AND o.complete_date IS NOT NULL AND DATE(o.complete_date) >= #{params.beginTime} AND DATE(o.complete_date) <= #{params.endTime} ) t GROUP BY t.date ORDER BY t.date

SELECT o.order_type AS order_type, CASE o.order_type WHEN '0' THEN '采购入库' WHEN '1' THEN '生产入库' WHEN '2' THEN '退货入库' WHEN '3' THEN '调拨入库' ELSE '其他' END AS name, COUNT(*) AS count, IFNULL(SUM(o.total_qty), 0) AS qty, IFNULL(SUM(o.total_amount), 0) AS amount FROM wms_inbound_order o WHERE o.del_flag = '0' AND o.status = '3' AND DATE(o.complete_date) >= #{params.beginTime} AND DATE(o.complete_date) <= #{params.endTime} GROUP BY o.order_type ORDER BY qty DESC

SELECT o.order_type AS order_type, CASE o.order_type WHEN '0' THEN '销售出库' WHEN '1' THEN '领料出库' WHEN '2' THEN '调拨出库' WHEN '3' THEN '退货出库' ELSE '其他' END AS name, COUNT(*) AS count, IFNULL(SUM(o.total_qty), 0) AS qty FROM wms_outbound_order o WHERE o.del_flag = '0' AND o.status = '3' AND DATE(o.complete_date) >= #{params.beginTime} AND DATE(o.complete_date) <= #{params.endTime} GROUP BY o.order_type ORDER BY qty DESC

SELECT m.material_id AS material_id, m.material_code AS material_code, m.material_name AS material_name, m.spec_model AS spec_model, m.unit AS unit, IFNULL(SUM(i.qty), 0) AS qty, IFNULL(SUM(i.lock_qty), 0) AS lock_qty, IFNULL(SUM(i.qty + i.lock_qty), 0) AS total_qty FROM wms_material m LEFT JOIN wms_inventory i ON m.material_id = i.material_id AND i.del_flag = '0' WHERE m.del_flag = '0' GROUP BY m.material_id, m.material_code, m.material_name, m.spec_model, m.unit ORDER BY total_qty DESC LIMIT #{count}

SELECT t.material_id, t.material_code, t.material_name, t.spec_model, t.unit, t.material_type, t.safety_stock_min, t.safety_stock_max, t.warehouse_name, IFNULL(t.qty, 0) AS qty FROM ( SELECT m.material_id AS material_id, m.material_code AS material_code, m.material_name AS material_name, m.spec_model AS spec_model, m.unit AS unit, m.material_type AS material_type, m.safety_stock_min AS safety_stock_min, m.safety_stock_max AS safety_stock_max, w.warehouse_name AS warehouse_name, SUM(IFNULL(i.qty, 0)) AS qty FROM wms_material m LEFT JOIN wms_inventory i ON m.material_id = i.material_id AND i.del_flag = '0' LEFT JOIN wms_warehouse w ON i.warehouse_id = w.warehouse_id AND w.del_flag = '0' WHERE m.del_flag = '0' AND m.safety_stock_min IS NOT NULL AND m.safety_stock_min > 0 GROUP BY m.material_id, m.material_code, m.material_name, m.spec_model, m.unit, m.material_type, m.safety_stock_min, m.safety_stock_max, w.warehouse_name ) t WHERE t.qty < t.safety_stock_min ORDER BY (t.safety_stock_min - t.qty) DESC

SELECT * FROM (
SELECT 'low_stock' AS alert_type, m.material_id AS material_id, m.material_code AS material_code, m.material_name AS material_name, m.spec_model AS spec_model, m.unit AS unit, m.material_type AS material_type, m.safety_stock_min AS safety_stock_min, m.safety_stock_max AS safety_stock_max, NULL AS warehouse_id, NULL AS warehouse_name, IFNULL(SUM(i.qty), 0) AS qty, NULL AS production_date, NULL AS expiry_date, NULL AS days_until_expiry, NULL AS expiry_alert_days, m.is_expiry_manage AS is_expiry_manage FROM wms_material m LEFT JOIN wms_inventory i ON m.material_id = i.material_id AND i.del_flag = '0' WHERE m.del_flag = '0' AND m.safety_stock_min IS NOT NULL AND m.safety_stock_min > 0 AND m.status = '0' GROUP BY m.material_id, m.material_code, m.material_name, m.spec_model, m.unit, m.material_type, m.safety_stock_min, m.safety_stock_max, m.is_expiry_manage HAVING IFNULL(SUM(i.qty), 0) < MAX(m.safety_stock_min)
UNION ALL
SELECT 'overstock' AS alert_type, m.material_id AS material_id, m.material_code AS material_code, m.material_name AS material_name, m.spec_model AS spec_model, m.unit AS unit, m.material_type AS material_type, m.safety_stock_min AS safety_stock_min, m.safety_stock_max AS safety_stock_max, NULL AS warehouse_id, NULL AS warehouse_name, IFNULL(SUM(i.qty), 0) AS qty, NULL AS production_date, NULL AS expiry_date, NULL AS days_until_expiry, NULL AS expiry_alert_days, m.is_expiry_manage AS is_expiry_manage FROM wms_material m LEFT JOIN wms_inventory i ON m.material_id = i.material_id AND i.del_flag = '0' WHERE m.del_flag = '0' AND m.safety_stock_max IS NOT NULL AND m.safety_stock_max > 0 AND m.status = '0' GROUP BY m.material_id, m.material_code, m.material_name, m.spec_model, m.unit, m.material_type, m.safety_stock_min, m.safety_stock_max, m.is_expiry_manage HAVING IFNULL(SUM(i.qty), 0) > MAX(m.safety_stock_max)
UNION ALL
SELECT 'near_expiry' AS alert_type, m.material_id AS material_id, m.material_code AS material_code, m.material_name AS material_name, m.spec_model AS spec_model, m.unit AS unit, m.material_type AS material_type, m.safety_stock_min AS safety_stock_min, m.safety_stock_max AS safety_stock_max, i.warehouse_id AS warehouse_id, w.warehouse_name AS warehouse_name, i.qty AS qty, i.production_date AS production_date, i.expiry_date AS expiry_date, DATEDIFF(i.expiry_date, NOW()) AS days_until_expiry, m.expiry_alert_days AS expiry_alert_days, m.is_expiry_manage AS is_expiry_manage FROM wms_inventory i INNER JOIN wms_material m ON i.material_id = m.material_id AND m.del_flag = '0' LEFT JOIN wms_warehouse w ON i.warehouse_id = w.warehouse_id AND w.del_flag = '0' WHERE i.del_flag = '0' AND m.is_expiry_manage = '1' AND i.expiry_date IS NOT NULL AND i.qty > 0 AND i.expiry_date > NOW() AND DATEDIFF(i.expiry_date, NOW()) <= IFNULL(m.expiry_alert_days, 30)
UNION ALL
SELECT 'expired' AS alert_type, m.material_id AS material_id, m.material_code AS material_code, m.material_name AS material_name, m.spec_model AS spec_model, m.unit AS unit, m.material_type AS material_type, m.safety_stock_min AS safety_stock_min, m.safety_stock_max AS safety_stock_max, i.warehouse_id AS warehouse_id, w.warehouse_name AS warehouse_name, i.qty AS qty, i.production_date AS production_date, i.expiry_date AS expiry_date, DATEDIFF(i.expiry_date, NOW()) AS days_until_expiry, m.expiry_alert_days AS expiry_alert_days, m.is_expiry_manage AS is_expiry_manage FROM wms_inventory i INNER JOIN wms_material m ON i.material_id = m.material_id AND m.del_flag = '0' LEFT JOIN wms_warehouse w ON i.warehouse_id = w.warehouse_id AND w.del_flag = '0' WHERE i.del_flag = '0' AND m.is_expiry_manage = '1' AND i.expiry_date IS NOT NULL AND i.qty > 0 AND i.expiry_date < NOW() ) t
AND t.alert_type = #{alertType} AND t.material_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{materialCode}, '%') AND t.material_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{materialName}, '%') AND t.material_type = #{materialType} AND t.warehouse_id = #{warehouseId}
ORDER BY CASE t.alert_type WHEN 'expired' THEN 1 WHEN 'near_expiry' THEN 2 WHEN 'low_stock' THEN 3 WHEN 'overstock' THEN 4 END, t.days_until_expiry ASC, t.material_code ASC

SELECT t.alert_type AS alert_type, COUNT(*) AS count FROM ( SELECT 'low_stock' AS alert_type FROM wms_material m LEFT JOIN wms_inventory i ON m.material_id = i.material_id AND i.del_flag = '0' WHERE m.del_flag = '0' AND m.safety_stock_min IS NOT NULL AND m.safety_stock_min > 0 AND m.status = '0' GROUP BY m.material_id, m.safety_stock_min HAVING IFNULL(SUM(i.qty), 0) < MAX(m.safety_stock_min)
UNION ALL
SELECT 'overstock' AS alert_type FROM wms_material m LEFT JOIN wms_inventory i ON m.material_id = i.material_id AND i.del_flag = '0' WHERE m.del_flag = '0' AND m.safety_stock_max IS NOT NULL AND m.safety_stock_max > 0 AND m.status = '0' GROUP BY m.material_id, m.safety_stock_max HAVING IFNULL(SUM(i.qty), 0) > MAX(m.safety_stock_max)
UNION ALL
SELECT 'near_expiry' AS alert_type FROM wms_inventory i INNER JOIN wms_material m ON i.material_id = m.material_id AND m.del_flag = '0' WHERE i.del_flag = '0' AND m.is_expiry_manage = '1' AND i.expiry_date IS NOT NULL AND i.qty > 0 AND i.expiry_date > NOW() AND DATEDIFF(i.expiry_date, NOW()) <= IFNULL(m.expiry_alert_days, 30)
UNION ALL
SELECT 'expired' AS alert_type FROM wms_inventory i INNER JOIN wms_material m ON i.material_id = m.material_id AND m.del_flag = '0' WHERE i.del_flag = '0' AND m.is_expiry_manage = '1' AND i.expiry_date IS NOT NULL AND i.qty > 0 AND i.expiry_date < NOW() ) t GROUP BY t.alert_type
mapper.update: UPDATE wms_material SET safety_stock_min = NULL, safety_stock_max = NULL WHERE material_id = #{materialId}
